title: amylocarpus xanthocarpus
intro: Amylocarpus xanthocarpus, also known as the yellow-berried amylocarpus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Amylocarpus xanthocarpus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
